name: chromium-common
title: chromium-common
summary: web browser - common resources used by the chromium packages
description:
web browser - common resources used by the chromium packages
Web browser that aims to build a safer, faster, and more stable internet
browsing experience.
.
This package contains resources that are in common to different chromium
packages.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use chromium-common because web browser - common resources used by the chromium packages.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use chromium-common as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair chromium-common with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `chromium-common --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
